stemHtml: When law enforcement officers carrying weapons are present on board, the State shall ensure that the…

options.a: pilot-in-command is notified only about the number of armed persons.
options.b: aircraft operator is notified only about the number of armed persons.
options.c: aircraft operator is notified about the number of armed persons and their seat location.
options.d: pilot-in-command is notified about the number of armed persons and their seat location.
